name: quality_infrastructure_full_gate_manifest
summary: Track 23 has repo-side quality infrastructure, optional mutation CI wiring, full strict Ruff evidence, strict basedpyright evidence, coverage-threshold evidence, and full quality-pass evidence.
non_surrogate_rule: Focused tests, scoped Ruff runs, scaffold checks, and configuration inspection are not accepted as substitutes for the full strict Ruff, strict basedpyright, coverage threshold, or full quality pass gates.

gates.command: pixi run python -m ruff check --no-cache --select ANN,D,TCH,YTT,RET src tests
gates.completion_criteria: Return code 0 on the configured strict rule set for the full intended source and test scope.
Strict basedpyright completes with no errors for the repository's configured type-checking scope.
Coverage run passes and reports at least the configured minimum coverage percentage.
The aggregate quality command completes successfully and includes lint, type-check, and test or coverage checks.

already_satisfied.evidence: .github/workflows/ci.yml exposes the optional workflow_dispatch mutation-testing gate and tests assert the required controls.
